pages.latin_text: Peter sōlus sedēbat. Tunicam nōn habēbat, calceōs nōn habēbat.
pages.english_text: Peter sat alone. He had no jacket and no shoes.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_003.jpg] Peter sitting sadly on a mossy bank in the woods. He is bare — no blue jacket, no shoes. He looks forlorn and cold.

pages.latin_text: Māter eum in sūdārium rubrum involvit.
pages.english_text: His mother wrapped him in a red handkerchief.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_007.jpg] Peter wrapped tightly in a big red cotton pocket-handkerchief. He looks small and miserable.

pages.latin_text: Beniāmīn Cunīculus cōnsobrīnus Petrī erat. Audāx erat.
pages.english_text: Benjamin Bunny was Peter's cousin. He was very bold.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_004.jpg] Benjamin Bunny walking confidently through the woods in his tam-o-shanter cap and brown jacket.

pages.latin_text: Beniāmīn Petrum invēnit. "Cūr trīstis es?" rogāvit.
pages.english_text: Benjamin found Peter. "Why are you sad?" he asked.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_008.jpg] Benjamin whispering to Peter, who is still wrapped in the red handkerchief.

pages.latin_text: "Tunicam in hortō āmīsī," inquit Peter.
pages.english_text: "I lost my jacket in the garden," said Peter.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_006.jpg] Peter sitting hunched in the handkerchief, looking down.

pages.latin_text: "Venī!" inquit Beniāmīn. "Eam recipiēmus!"
pages.english_text: "Come!" said Benjamin. "We will get it back!"
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_009.jpg] Benjamin leading Peter along the path toward the garden.

pages.latin_text: Mūrum hortī ascendērunt et dēspexērunt.
pages.english_text: They climbed up the garden wall and looked down.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_010.jpg] Benjamin and Peter on top of the high garden wall, looking down into Mr. McGregor's garden.

pages.latin_text: Peter dē mūrō cecidit! In hortum dēvolūtus est.
pages.english_text: Peter fell down from the wall! He tumbled into the garden.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_011.jpg] Peter tumbling and falling off the wall into the garden. Benjamin watches from above.

pages.latin_text: Tunicam Petrī in formīdine vīdērunt!
pages.english_text: They saw Peter's jacket on the scarecrow!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_013.jpg] The scarecrow dressed in Peter's blue jacket. Benjamin takes back the hat. Birds watch.

pages.latin_text: Beniāmīn tunicam dētrāxit. Peter eam induit.
pages.english_text: Benjamin took the jacket off the scarecrow. Peter put it on.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_012.jpg] Peter now wearing his blue jacket again, standing with Benjamin.

pages.latin_text: Tum cēpās collēgērunt. Corbulam implēvērunt.
pages.english_text: Then they picked onions to fill their basket.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_014.jpg] Peter and Benjamin among rows of onions, gathering them into a basket.

pages.latin_text: Beniāmīn lactūcam ēdit. Nihil timēbat.
pages.english_text: Benjamin ate some lettuce. He was not afraid at all.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_015.jpg] Benjamin munching lettuce among the lettuce rows. Peter peeks from behind.

pages.latin_text: Peter cēpās identidem āmittēbat. Trepidābat!
pages.english_text: Peter kept dropping the onions. He was nervous!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_016.jpg] Peter holding the red handkerchief bundle, onions spilling and rolling on the ground.

pages.latin_text: Peter sonitum audīvit. "Abīre dēbēmus!" inquit.
pages.english_text: Peter heard a noise. "We must go!" he said.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_019.jpg] Peter and Benjamin alert in the garden shed area. Peter's ears up — he heard something.

pages.latin_text: Tum fēlem vīdērunt! Magna erat.
pages.english_text: Then they saw the cat! She was very big.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_020.jpg] The two rabbits peering around a corner, seeing the large tabby cat lying in the garden path.

pages.latin_text: Sub corbulā sē abdidērunt. Fēlēs suprā cōnsēdit!
pages.english_text: They hid under a basket. The cat sat on top!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_022.jpg] The big tabby cat sleeping on top of a woven basket, trapping Peter and Benjamin inside.

pages.latin_text: Diū exspectāvērunt. Sē movēre nōn poterant.
pages.english_text: They waited and waited. They could not move.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_021.jpg] The cat sniffing at the basket from the side. The rabbits are trapped inside.

pages.latin_text: Tum senex Dominus Bouncer vēnit! Pater Beniāmīnī erat.
pages.english_text: Then old Mr. Bouncer came! He was Benjamin's father.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_023.jpg] Old Mr. Bouncer striding through the garden, stern, smoking a pipe, carrying a switch.

pages.latin_text: Dominus Bouncer in fēlem insiluit! Fēlēs fūgit!
pages.english_text: Mr. Bouncer jumped on the cat! She ran away!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_024.jpg] Mr. Bouncer leaping onto the startled cat, who recoils in surprise.

pages.latin_text: Beniāmīnum auribus prehendit. Beniāmīn poenās dabat.
pages.english_text: He pulled Benjamin out by the ears. Benjamin was in trouble.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_025.jpg] Mr. Bouncer grabbing Benjamin by the ears, scolding him. Peter watches.

pages.latin_text: Dominus Bouncer eōs domum dūxit. Per portam exiērunt!
pages.english_text: Mr. Bouncer marched them all home. Out the gate!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_026.jpg] Mr. Bouncer marching Benjamin and Peter out through the garden gate.

pages.latin_text: Peter cēpās mātrī dedit. Tunicam suam habēbat iterum!
pages.english_text: Peter gave the onions to his mother. He had his jacket back!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_028.jpg] Peter back in his blue jacket, giving onions to Mrs. Rabbit at home. A warm homecoming.
